title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.510 - Joint fire department — use of moneys from bonds
text:
71.510.  Joint fire department — use of moneys from bonds. — The moneys derived from such bonds shall be deposited in the city treasury and be paid out for the purposes for which the bonds were issued in such manner as may be provided by ordinance.
(RSMo 1939 § 7402) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7251
